narrative:
Deer Park 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,158 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
